data.current_description: Retrieves one or more random tarot cards. By default returns 1 major arcana card.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve random tarot cards with optional filtering
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves one or more random tarot cards from the full deck or filtered by arcana type. Accepts optional parameters: 'count' (number of cards to return, default 1) and 'arcana' (filter by 'major', 'minor', or 'all', default 'major'). Returns a TarotCardsResponse object containing an array of randomly selected TarotCard objects with complete card data.
data.reasoning: The current description is vague about parameter options and lacks output schema details. The summary is awkward with '(s)'.
